input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.8.3.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ic.8.3.2
            TITLE: this voltage limit does not apply to the following systems:

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.8.3.2: This voltage limit does not apply to the following systems:
IC.8.3.2 This voltage limit does not apply to the following systems: 
• High Voltage systems for ignition 
• High Voltage systems for injectors
Formula SAE® Rules 2024 © 2023 SAE International  Page 88 of 140   
Version 1.0   1 Sep 2023 
• Voltages internal to OEM charging systems designed for <60 V DC output.

final_answer: rule IC.8.3.2: This voltage limit does not apply to the following systems: IC.8.3.2 This voltage limit does not apply to the following systems: • High Voltage systems for ignition • High Voltage systems for injectors • Voltages internal to OEM charging systems designed for <60 V DC output.
